title: Optional procedure
doc_html:
§4246.  Optional procedure

The right of a judgment creditor to bring an action to enforce the judgment under Article 2541 of the Code of Civil Procedure is preserved.

Acts 1985, No. 464, §1.
doc_text:
§4246.  Optional procedure
The right of a judgment creditor to bring an action to enforce the judgment under Article 2541 of the Code of Civil Procedure is preserved.
Acts 1985, No. 464, §1.
